goal: is_order_convex_real_set(s) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { s.contains(x0) and s.contains(x1) and x0 <= x2 and x2 <= x1 implies s.contains(x2) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or not x2 ∈ x0 or not x1 <= x3 or not x3 <= x2 or x3 ∈ x0 } = is_order_convex_real_set(x0) }(s)

goal: s.contains(x) and s.contains(y) and x <= z and z <= y implies s.contains(z)
proof: is_order_convex_real_set(s) and x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x <= z
not is_order_convex_real_set(s) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or not x0 <= x2 or not x2 <= x1 or x2 ∈ s } = true
is_order_convex_real_set(s) and x ∈ s
function(x0: Real) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or not x0 <= x2 or not x2 <= x1 or x2 ∈ s } = true }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or not x0 <= x2 or not x2 <= x1 or x2 ∈ s } = true }(x, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not (x0 ∈ s and x1 ∈ s and x0 <= x2 and x2 <= x1 and not x2 ∈ s) }(x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](y, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(y, x)

goal: disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z) = (s.contains(x) and s.contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not s.contains(z))
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(s, x, y, z)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(s)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s, w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ closed_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x0 <= x2 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ closed_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x2 <= x1 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](closed_interval_set(x, y), s)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x0 < x2 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x2 < x1 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](x, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(x, z)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](z, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(z, y)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](open_interval_set(x, y), s)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ left_open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x0 < x2 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ left_open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x2 <= x1 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](x, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(x, z)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](left_open_interval_set(x, y), s)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ right_open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x0 <= x2 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ right_open_interval_set[T0](x0, x1) or x2 < x1 }[Real](x, y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](z, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(z, y)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](right_open_interval_set(x, y), s)
